features.name: Architecture alignment
features.notes: Architecture matches ontology + retrieval + vLLM + validation-loop target.

features.name: Source-level feature coverage
features.notes: Passes 0-7 source features are implemented and validated through source/mocked harnesses.

features.name: Python/source-mocked test coverage
features.notes: Python tests and source/mocked E2E scripts are part of source/mocked acceptance.

features.name: Provider abstraction
features.notes: Provider trait, local vLLM, remote fallback, circuit breaker, retry/backoff, and route history are source-level implemented.

features.name: Remote fallback
features.notes: Remote fallback is explicit, role-aware, audited, and not silent.

features.name: Structured outputs
features.notes: Role-specific schema contracts govern planner, codegen, math, repair, human checkpoint, and run report output.

features.name: Planner/codegen/math schemas
features.notes: Schema validation and fake structured-output tests cover accepted and rejected model outputs.

features.name: Run state / locking / resume
features.notes: Run state, lock metadata, cancellation, status, command audit, and source/mocked resume semantics are implemented.

features.name: Sandbox and path safety
features.notes: Production profiles default toward sandbox behavior and path safety rejects traversal/symlink escape patterns.

features.name: OpenSearch mapping/migration source proof
features.notes: Mapping, FAISS/HNSW fields, aliases, dimension mismatch, and fallback query behavior are source/mocked tested.

features.name: Fuseki named graph source proof
features.notes: Ontology/document/run/validation graph discipline and graph-store upload contracts are source/mocked tested.

features.name: SPARQL fact summary
features.notes: Planner grounding summarizes the full SPARQL query pack into typed facts.

features.name: SHACL core/math/gate
features.notes: Core and math SHACL rules and source/mocked governance proof are implemented.

features.name: Formula image/OCR contract
features.notes: Command and HTTP OCR providers are contract-tested with fallback states; live OCR quality remains corpus-dependent.

features.name: Human review UX
features.notes: Citation, formula, representation, plan, code architecture, and validation checkpoints are source/mocked implemented.

features.name: Documentation and scorecard automation
features.notes: Scorecard generation separates source/mocked acceptance from live host acceptance.

features.name: Rust validation
features.notes: Skipped in this scoped pass; run cargo fmt/check/test/clippy on a Rust host.

features.name: Docker E2E validation
features.notes: Skipped in this scoped pass; run Docker fake-vLLM E2E on a Docker host.

features.name: Live vLLM validation
features.notes: Skipped in this scoped pass; run live vLLM smoke on target GPU/model host.
